risk_reasoning_rules.reasoning_template: This shipment has a very high risk score due to {criticality_level} criticality and {delay_severity} delay severity.
Risk score is elevated due to {criticality_level} cargo and {delay_severity} delay severity.
Moderate risk level due to {criticality_level} cargo and {delay_severity} delay.
Low risk - {criticality_level} cargo and {delay_severity} delay severity.

Liquid Oxygen.80: IMMEDIATE ESCALATION: Activate emergency road transport backup and alert hospital management immediately.
Liquid Oxygen.50: ALERT: Coordinate with hospital backup oxygen reserves and prepare emergency backup transport.
Liquid Oxygen.30: MONITOR: Update hospital oxygen levels and ETA.

Vaccines and Medicine.80: IMMEDIATE ESCALATION: Reroute via refrigerated truck and monitor cold chain continuously.
Vaccines and Medicine.50: ALERT: Check cold chain integrity and expedite shipment.
Vaccines and Medicine.30: MONITOR: Track cold chain and update ETA.

Jet Fuel.80: IMMEDIATE ESCALATION: Dispatch backup fuel tanker convoy immediately.
Jet Fuel.50: ALERT: Notify airport fuel reserves and prepare backup supplies.

Coal.80: IMMEDIATE ESCALATION: Activate emergency coal supplies via alternative rail.
Coal.50: ALERT: Notify power plant of delay and monitor coal reserves.
Coal.30: MONITOR: Update ETA to power plant.

Perishable Food (Produce).80: IMMEDIATE ESCALATION: Reroute via refrigerated truck immediately.
Perishable Food (Produce).50: ALERT: Notify distribution center of potential spoilage.
Perishable Food (Produce).30: MONITOR: Update ETA and spoilage risk.

Industrial Chemicals.80: IMMEDIATE ESCALATION: Notify water treatment facility and prepare backup chemicals.
Industrial Chemicals.50: ALERT: Monitor shipment status with water treatment facility.

action_recommendations.action: IMMEDIATE ESCALATION: Re-route via priority track and dispatch emergency substitute.
ALERT: Expedite transit and notify downstream stakeholders to prepare contingencies.
MONITOR: Update ETA and notify receiving facility.
LOG: Standard delay logging. No immediate action required.
